name: Xcel Energy
analysis: XEL has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 2% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (0.9× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $81.2750, stop $75.9542, target $97.2375 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
